evidence: first_action_clarity 8.5: on 375x844 and 390x844 (release-r4-final-chromium/photo/task-375x844.png, task-390x844.png) the first viewport shows topic, mode ('Самостоятельная работа' / h1 'Реши самостоятельно'), meta 'ЗАДАЧА 1 · МОЖНО ОТВЕЧАТЬ', the full statement, and a single orange primary CTA (geometry primary y=681 h=57.6 -> bottom 739 < 844, mode_switch present). One competing-primary is avoided: secondaries ('Не знаю…', 'Спросить AI-помощника') are visually subordinate. Deduction: mobile header progress pill overlaps the floating exit button (see mobile_comfort P2).

journey_continuity 9: single-page workspace, no route/page change — I drove the full live journey (register -> diagnostic -> workspace -> tutor -> guided) and URL stayed http://127.0.0.1:8302/app throughout. Task statement stays anchored during feedback AND during tutor (TutorSheet re-renders the statement, LearningWorkspace.tsx:1268-1271). Incorrect typed keeps draft: typed-summary.json shows preserved_answer '0' still in the field (typed-incorrect-390x844.png). Correct typed '15' advances in place without photo (typed-summary.json correct.advanced_without_photo=true -> transfer_task 332). Stale-draft 409 recovery UI present (LearningWorkspace.tsx:631-639). Live Escape restored focus to tutor-trigger and reset body overflow (my browser_evaluate: activeTestId 'tutor-trigger', bodyOverflow none).

math_focus 8.5: statement is the dominant text block — mobile statement 1.18rem with KaTeX (LearningWorkspace.css:931-935,152-154), desktop (photo/task-1280x900.png) is a genuine two-column grid (LearningWorkspace.css:103-109) with math filling the left and the composer a contained right card; brand mark is small; AI chrome hidden behind a button. Not three competing panels.

guided_instruction 8.5: live guided step (my judge-guided-step.png) renders direct prompt 'Запиши число, которое получилось на этом шаге.', specific instruction 'Найди массу соли: 25% от 300 г → 0,25 × 300.', a 'Что написать' format block, and a foreign-number example 'Например: 7' (step answer is 75 — example does NOT bear the answer), plus an explicit mastery-safe note 'Разбор помогает понять способ. Уровень подтвердит следующая самостоятельная задача.' (LearningWorkspace.tsx:855-876). Satisfies acceptance #1 (child knows what to do and what to write). P2 nit: the format-hint paragraph and the example both render 'Например: 7' (visible duplication) and the format hint carries no type/unit beyond the example.

tutor_usefulness 9: LIVE contextual, non-canned reply — I asked 'почему при добавлении воды процент соли уменьшается?' and the AI answered 'Масса соли остается прежней, но общее количество раствора увеличивается из-за добавленной воды. Как изменится общая масса раствора после добавления 200 грамм воды?' (judge-tutor-reply.png): grounded in the task, explains the concept, ends with ONE guiding question, does not reveal the final answer. Two telemetry runs agree (chromium public-photo-cjm-summary.json tutor.reply, webkit same). Tutor sees statement+step (LearningWorkspace.tsx:516-535,1268-1271). Directly closes owner complaint 'AI помощник не отвечает ничего кроме как дай мне следующий шаг'.

mobile_comfort 8.5: mobile-first single column, composer in document flow (not a fixed dock) so keyboard-safe; targets >=44px (live min interactive height 44, primary 58, input 56); horizontal_overflow=0 across 375/390/844x375/932x430/1280 in both engines (all summaries); landscape short-height CTA sits on the first screen — the r3->r4 fix — typed-incorrect-844x375 primary y=247.75 h=44 -> bottom 291.75 < 375 (typed-summary.json). P2: on 390x844 the '.workbook-session__progress' pill (x286-374) is overlapped ~44px by the floating 'Сменить ученика' exit button (x330-376) — measured live; a crowding blemish, but it obscures an informational pill, not an input/focus target or the CTA, and does not cause overflow, so no critical cap.

accessibility_resilience 8.5: role=dialog aria-modal tutor with focus trap, Escape close and focus restore (LearningWorkspace.tsx:344-355,368-395), body-overflow lock/restore (333-342) — all live-verified; aria-live status + sr-only live region (720-725,815-822); visible orange focus outline (824-828); prefers-reduced-motion handling (1285-1295); labeled inputs; Cyrillic+KaTeX render fine. Full state coverage: processing, recovery, incorrect, unsure, correct, empty. Minor: incorrect state shows a green check '✓ … · ответ проверен' next to the wrong answer (EvidenceStrip 756-757) — a slightly mixed signal (own-eyes flag); a VERBOSE password-form advisory exists on the /login page only (not the workspace, not an error).

premium_distinctiveness 8.5: a genuinely new editorial 'рабочая тетрадь' system — warm paper radial gradient + deep forest ink + one disciplined orange action with a hard-shadow pressable primary + thin notebook rule lines + uppercase kickers (LearningWorkspace.css). Not the old three-zone 'Фокус-станция', not card soup, not a token reskin, not a media-query-squeezed desktop; mastery uses real evidence '1/3 · осталось новых решений 2' (feedback-375x844.png), not fake progress. Deductions are the same P2 polish nicks: mobile header pill/exit overlap, guided 'Например: 7' duplication, green-check-on-wrong-answer microcopy.

photo invariants: wrong-photo real HEIC on the salt task -> photo_recovery reason 'wrong_photo' with 'На фото не видно решения этой задачи' + 'Замени снимок без штрафа' (real-heic.png; public-photo-cjm-summary.json heic.stage=photo_recovery), NOT called a math error; the SAME IMG_4979.heic on its matching task ('дальше от 1/2: 3/7 или 4/9') -> AI verdict correct in 7.035s (matching-heic-summary.json) — proves genuine AI vision, not a rigged script. Known-correct JPEG -> photo_feedback correct.

no-script-verdict / no-photo-for-correct: incorrect typed verdict came from a real AI call (typed-summary.json incorrect.elapsed_seconds 3.592, verdict 'incorrect', focus 'calculation' -> 'Проверь вычисления', answer NOT revealed); correct typed advanced without any photo (advanced_without_photo=true). Guided is mastery-safe (mastery only on independent/transfer photo_feedback, LearningWorkspace.tsx:142-146,882-883). Backend 696 passed incl. release/practice safety (EVIDENCE-SNAPSHOT.md). No critical cap triggered.

cleanliness: console_errors / page_errors / request_failures / http_errors all empty in chromium+webkit typed and photo summaries; git diff --check clean, tsc/eslint/design-lint/vitest green (EVIDENCE-SNAPSHOT.md). All three P2 items above are polish nits, not P0/P1.
